channel.title: Comments for page "Project Damnerung"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Project Damnerung"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Major formatting tip: you can use the "@@" symbol to cancel out formatting, if you want to show people how to do code, or such. For example:

 @@[[[Project-damn-oh-fuck| Project Damnerung]]]@@

Results in:

[[[Project-damn-oh-fuck| Project Damnerung]]]

Alternatively, you can just use [[code]] like I did above.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Well, yes but if you just remember the title and you try to hotlink this with that, it won't work. Happens to me all the time with things like this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It still works. You just need to do it like this if you want the correct title:

[[Project-damn-oh-fuck| Project Damnerung]]

But with a third brace around it of course.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
the act of inducing amnesia in the entire human race would most-likely be as catastrophic as restoring death without alerting anyone

I feel like this should be linked to SCP-3848 or its related tales.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Unless you really prefer to just use triple brackets to hotlink. :(

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Besides everything else this does really well, it has one of the best URLs on the site.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Though I can't say I'm a big fan of exposition dumps, this was handled quite well and I can't recall any other instance of such a thing happening in EoD before so it gets a pass from me. :P

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Yet another tale for End of Death season 2! This time with more backstory onto the O5-4, who started the whole thing.

Thanks to DarkStuff, Stallmantic, MaliceAForethought and Croquembouche for reviewing it!
